calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside The Judgment To Set Aside The Judgment Pursuant To Cal. Code Civ. Proc. 473
Off Calendar Aug-30-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF GE MONEY BANK's Motion To Set Aside The Judgment Pursuant To Cal. Code Civ. Proc. section 473.

Plaintiff GE Money Bank's motion to set aside judgment is granted. No opposition filed and good cause shown. Moving party to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the Court's ruling.Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Gordon Aiavao, CSR#11216, gaiavao@sftc.org, Reported. =(302/HK)
